headline: Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) Fits the 'Growth at a Reasonable Price' Strategy
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) exemplifies GARP investing, offering strong accelerating growth at a reasonable valuation within the semiconductor sector.
